creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text:
This all sounds good to me.

With the demise of bsdstats, we can't get a feel for how many people are still using portupgrade. While there was a very small number of sites submitting stats, at least we could point to it and go "at least N people are using it".

Anyway, as soon as the portupgrade patch lands, I'll close this PR.
